scope: rocprofv3 kernel trace for the Actual-LI S4096 layer-2 dot_k_atomic compressed-dKV diagnostic on one MI350.

probe_event_timing.read: Do not use the in-probe CUDA event timing from the rocprof run for performance; profiling overhead contaminated the single timing sample. Use trace_kernel_stats.csv for the kernel duration.

read: The rocprof trace agrees with the clean unprofiled dot_k_atomic timing: the target kernel itself is 8.614 ms, close to the retained 8.806 ms CUDA-event median. It also reinforces the mechanism read: selected-key dot batching is not the wall once the dense route matrix is removed; the remaining work is global many-to-one compressed-dKV accumulation with actual write reduction still 1.0x.
